allow: Bash(minikube ssh --profile inference --node inference "crictl images 2>/dev/null | grep draft || echo ''not found''")
Bash(MINIKUBE_PROFILE=inference minikube ssh --native-ssh=false -n $node -- "sudo ctr -n k8s.io images ls | grep draft")
Bash(MINIKUBE_PROFILE=inference minikube ssh --native-ssh=false -n $node -- "sudo ctr -n k8s.io images ls | grep draft | awk ''{print $1, $5}''")
Bash(MINIKUBE_PROFILE=inference kubectl create namespace draft --dry-run=client -o yaml)

Bash(sed -i '' 's/| `kubernetes\\/draft\\/values.yaml` | All configurable values with defaults and inline comments |/| `kubernetes\\/draft\\/values.yaml` | All configurable values with defaults and inline comments |\\n| `kubernetes\\/draft\\/values.mcp.yaml` | Committed overlay template: `sourcesConfig` + `docSources` with placeholder host paths. Copy to `values.local.yaml` and fill in real paths before deploying. |\\n| `values.local.yaml` | **Gitignored.** Your real host paths \(e.g. `\\/Volumes\\/External\\/...`\). Layered on top of `values.mcp.yaml` at deploy time: `helm upgrade ... -f kubernetes\\/draft\\/values.mcp.yaml -f values.local.yaml`. |/' /Volumes/External/workspace/draft/docs/container_orchestration.md)

Bash(sed -i '' 's/| `kubernetes\\/draft\\/templates\\/configmap.yaml` | Non-secret env: DRAFT_HOME, HF_HUB_OFFLINE, LLM provider, OTel |/| `kubernetes\\/draft\\/templates\\/configmap.yaml` | Non-secret env: DRAFT_HOME, HF_HUB_OFFLINE, LLM provider, OTel |\\n| `kubernetes\\/draft\\/templates\\/configmap-sources.yaml` | `sources.yaml` ConfigMap \(rendered from `sourcesConfig`\); mounted at `DRAFT_HOME\\/sources.yaml` via `subPath` |/' /Volumes/External/workspace/draft/docs/container_orchestration.md)

projectConventions.scriptsCli: Use Click for CLI parsing in scripts (e.g. serve_mcp.py, serve.py, pull.py, ask.py). No argparse for new or updated script entrypoints.
